title: Air-Fried Citrus Flax Bread
description: A light and citrusy Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring bread flour, lightly air-fried for a low-fat-friendly option.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup flax seeds
ingredients.notes: Ground and mixed with water to form a dough.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine bread flour and flax seeds.
Add the juiced lemon and orange into the mixture.
Mix in the pinch of salt until the dough is formed.
Transfer the dough onto a lightly floured surface to knead for about 3-5 minutes.
Place the dough seam side down in a greased pan, cover with plastic wrap, and let it rest for about 10 minutes.
Bake the bread in the preheated air fryer for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
